name: Nikki Co., Ltd.
summary: Nikki Co., Ltd. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells carburetors and fuel equipment in Japan and internationally. The company offers gas-fueled automobile components, including fuel rail assemblies, injectors, vaporizers, regulators, and fuel filters; automobile components, such as actuators and power valves; and electronic control equipment comprising electronic control units and sensors. It also provides industrial engine components and gaseous fueled general purpose engine components consisting of throttle body for general purpose engines, general purpose carburetors, GHP-mixers, and GHP-Zero governors. In addition, the company offers conversion kit that is used for converting CNG or LPG fuel supply system from gasoline engine. The company was formerly known as Nippon Carburetor Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Nikki Co., Ltd. in 2001. Nikki Co., Ltd. was founded in 1932 and is headquartered in Atsugi, Japan.
